ability.en: There can't be more than 1 extra evil player.

flavor_text.en: "The Wasteland calls. Bones rise to flesh, then fall to dust. The great spirit grows. The great spirit watches. The great spirit guides. The human listens, or the human is no more."

en: The Fang Gu attacks an Outsider and creates an evil player. The Devil's Advocate chooses the Goon at night. Normally, the Goon would turn evil, but the Goon remains good because there is already 1 more evil character than normal in play.

how_to_run.en: At the start of the game, declare that the Spirit of Ivory is in play. Add the Spirit of Ivory token and their reminder token to the Grimoire.
